name: ddd-expert
description: Adversarial HITP EventStorming plus confirmed-Model implementation and review

interface.longDescription: DDD workflow that facilitates the ten EventStorming steps one frontier decision at a time, challenges the integrated model from multiple perspectives, writes incremented canonical draft Models for approval, and promotes them with synchronized documentation after explicit model confirmation; model_ready enters Codify directly for implementation and independent review.
defaultPrompt: Use $ddd-expert:event-storming to facilitate the ten EventStorming steps on a temporary EventStorming Board. Ask one frontier decision at a time, recommend design choices with their strongest credible alternative, validate and write incremented canonical draft Models, summarize them for explicit user confirmation, then promote the same revisions and synchronize relevant documentation; model_ready is ready for $ddd-expert:codify.
